description: Allowed det(U)<0 in square 2x2 factorisations; no target gain and slightly slower baseline
Deduplicated canonical successors within each frontier-node expansion in BFS
Continue exploring when one bidirectional frontier empties; no target gain and slower overall runtime
Combined deeper frontier exploration with det(U)<0 square factorisations; still no Brix-Ruiz hit and slower
Revalidated canonical-successor dedup on a fresh harness run; same score with lower total runtime
Deduplicated canonical successors across each full frontier layer; same score with much lower duplicate work on Brix-Ruiz telemetry
Added bounded 3x3 same-size moves via cached identity splits; huge factorisation blow-up with no new Brix-Ruiz nodes
Deduplicated factorisation outputs by VU inside the dispatcher; fewer factors but slower overall due extra multiplication cost
Specialized 2x2 and 3x3 permutation canonicalization in the search hot loop; same score with faster warm harness runtime
Optimized small-matrix multiplication to use row slices and zero-skips; same score with a slightly faster warm harness run
